name: LearnMate
description: Agentic AI for Personalized Course Pathways — an AI coach that assesses a student's skill level and stated goals, then builds a course roadmap that adapts over time based on progress and preference, powered by IBM Granite via IBM watsonx.ai.
problemStatement: Problem Statement No. 12 — Agentic AI for Personalized Course Pathways
technologies: IBM Cloud Lite (Watson Machine Learning Runtime)
features: Interactive skill assessment that determines the learner's starting level
RAG-based course retrieval grounded in a structured knowledge base
Preference-driven course recommendations based on student goals
Adaptive roadmap replanning when course progress is updated
Full-stack application with deployed frontend and backend
